subcodes.first_line: O Merciful Lord! Thy loved ones are homeless and scattered, and Thy friends are captive in the hands of the oppressors, from every side assailed by arrow and spear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یزدان مهربان یارانت بی سر و سامانند و دوستانت اسیر در دست عوانان از هر طرف تیر و سنانی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
